sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90978" key="prwto/karpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτό-καρπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n90978.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yielding the first harvest</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἀτθίς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0203.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Limen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
